DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT VIJAY CHAND'S MOTION COMPELLING RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND INSPECTION DEMAND; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, GRANTED. SANCTIONS SHALL ISSUE IN THE SUM OF $290.00, PAYABLE WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

Notice And Motion Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Inspection Demand And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Vijay Chand's Motion compelling responses to interrogatories and inspection demand; and for award of monetary sanctions, granted:
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete and verified response to defendant's form interrogatories (set one), and demand for production (set one) within ten days of notice of entry of this order;
c. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2009 Assigned To Arbitration On Oct-19-09; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Dec-01-09 At 11:00 A.M.
